Package org.odpi.openmetadata.frameworks.openmetadata.properties.security

package org.odpi.openmetadata.frameworks.openmetadata.properties.security
Beans for describing the required security.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.odpi.openmetadata.frameworks.openmetadata.properties
    These beans describe the core properties that are passed to the server to create and update metadata.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AssociatedSecurityListProperties
    AssociatedSecurityGroupProperties identified an operation that the security groups map to.
    GovernanceZoneProperties
    GovernanceZoneProperties describes a governance zone.
    ResourcePermissionsProperties
    ResourcePermissionsProperties describes the properties between a secrets collection and a security access control.
    SecretsCollectionSecurityListProperties
    SecretsCollectionSecurityListProperties describes the properties between a secrets collection and a security list.
    SecurityAccessControlProperties
    SecurityAccessControlProperties defines the access control list for an element (or elements).
    SecurityGroupProperties
    SecurityGroupProperties defines a security group technical control.
    SecurityListMembershipProperties
    SecurityListMembershipProperties holds the list of names that the attached user identity is a member of.
    SecurityListProperties
    SecurityListProperties defines a group of security groups or security roles.
    SecurityRoleProperties
    SecurityRoleProperties defines a security group technical control.
    SecurityTagsProperties
    SecurityTagsProperties holds the list of labels and properties used by a security enforcement engine to control access and visibility to the contents of the real-world object described by the Referenceable.
    ServiceAccessControlProperties
    GovernanceZoneProperties describes a governance zone.
    UserAccountProperties
    UserAccountProperties describes the properties between a secrets collection and a user identity.
    ZoneHierarchyProperties
    ZoneHierarchyProperties describes the properties for the ZoneHierarchy relationship between 2 governance zones.
    ZoneMembershipProfileProperties
    List of zones that the element belongs to
    ZoneMembershipProperties
    List of zones that the element belongs to
